meaning: n.(西班牙或葡萄牙的)议会,国会
examples: It was Day 1 of our vacation on Cortes, a beautiful quiet island.
The Conquest of Mexico by Hernando Cortes.
Manuel Cortes, leader of the TSSA rail union said rail passengers had already suffered enough above-inflation fare rises.
The Spanish conquistador, Hernan Cortes, first set eyes on Tenochtitlan, as it was then called in 1519.
